response.justification: Over a decade of fullstack experience with strong alignment to the role's TypeScript/Node.js/React stack, including recent AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators) that directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrated breadth across backend, frontend, mobile, and DevOps, plus a track record of ownership at multiple Berlin startups.
strengths: Direct match on TypeScript/Node.js/React with 6+ years fullstack experience
Current AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned
